title: Lesson 336: 先ず, 混ず, 又は...

items.gloss: first (of all); firstly; to begin with; before anything else; probably; most likely; almost certainly; virtually; more or less (satisfactory); on the whole; reasonably; anyway; at any rate; for now (at least); for the time being
to mix; to stir; to blend
to make a mistake (in); to commit an error (e.g. in calculation); to confuse; to mistake something for something else
to be in time (for); to serve (suit, meet) the purpose; to be good enough; to be enough; to manage; to make do
circumference; girth; surroundings; neighbourhood; neighborhood; vicinity; people surrounding oneself; surrounding circumstances
to go around; to return; to surround; to concern (usu. of disputes)
